description_long: This cowshed is a large, rectangular agricultural building with a steeply pitched gambrel roof clad in red shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic, traditional appearance. Three rectangular skylight windows are evenly spaced along the roof, providing natural light to the interior. The front features two large barn-style doors and a covered entry supported by wooden posts, while one side has a wooden staircase leading to a raised door. The rear of the building is plain except for a single door, and the opposite end has two small rectangular windows. The structure is elevated slightly above ground, with open space beneath part of the front overhang.
description: A large wooden cowshed with a red gambrel roof, skylight windows, barn doors, and a side staircase. The design is rustic and functional, typical of traditional agricultural buildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large barn doors, a covered entry supported by posts, and three skylight windows on the red gambrel roof.
description_view_1: Side view with a prominent wooden staircase leading to a raised door and the steeply pitched roof with skylights visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden wall with a single door and the full expanse of the red roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring two small rectangular windows and the roof's skylights, with no staircase or large doors visible.
attribute_door_style: double sliding barn doors and single wooden plank doors
attribute_window_presence: three rectangular skylight windows on the roof, two small rectangular windows on one side
